=== unchecked
# Unchecked checkbox.
widget: checkbox
title: Checkbox
width: 20
height: 3
label: Enable feature
===
╔═ Checkbox ═══════╗
║[ ] Enable feature║
╚══════════════════╝

=== checked
# Checked checkbox.
widget: checkbox
title: Checkbox
width: 20
height: 3
label: Enable feature
checked: true
===
╔═ Checkbox ═══════╗
║[x] Enable feature║
╚══════════════════╝

=== focused_unchecked
# Focused unchecked checkbox — rendered with highlight colours.
widget: checkbox
title: Checkbox
width: 20
height: 3
label: Enable feature
focused: true
===
╔═ Checkbox ═══════╗
║[ ] Enable feature║
╚══════════════════╝

=== focused_checked
# Focused checked checkbox.
widget: checkbox
title: Checkbox
width: 20
height: 3
label: Enable feature
checked: true
focused: true
===
╔═ Checkbox ═══════╗
║[x] Enable feature║
╚══════════════════╝
